commits.subject: 4RC paper summary + DCF motion head design spec (draft)

tasks_completed.summary: Cloned 4RC repo to remote third_party/4RC via local-clone+rsync (direct remote clone stalled)
Read 4RC architecture code: arc.py, motiondecoder.py, dinov2.py, blocks, inference.py
4-path migration effort analysis (drop-in / port+causality / distillation / factored-only)
Brainstorm Q1: goal = both train-fit + overfit; architecture is the bottleneck, not data alone
Brainstorm Q2 (with user correction): dual-head design — traj per-frame absolute + motion decoder
Brainstorm Q3: 4-view training budget preserved given dual-head; strict-causal pairs
User-corrected 'only learn points' principle; disabled dcf_object_pose_head for this experiment
Self-reviewed spec: tightened strict-causal bound (q<t), simplified positional-encoding story
Sub-agent coverage audit: 23/23 items A–W present, one partial (O) fixed, 12 appropriate additions noted
Debug container SSH ports migrated 46681/46682 → 20161/21161; memory updated

tasks_pending.summary: User reviews and approves (or revises) the motion-head spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-21-dcf-motion-head-design.md. Brainstorming-skill gate; do NOT start coding without this.
Invoke superpowers:writing-plans to turn the spec into a sequenced TDD implementation plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-dcf-motion-head-plan.md. Only after spec approval.
Carried from AM session: expand training manifest beyond subject-01 to subjects 00–06 (s1_train). Architectural findings remain contaminated without this; unchanged by today's design.
Carried from AM session: full s1_test eval across all ~200 sequences in subjects 7+8, not the 1-sequence current numbers.
Update dcf_memory_probe.py with --enable-motion-head, --motion-pairs, --query-count flags (per feedback_dcf_memprobe_config_drift). Run after impl lands.
Add config default dcf.enable_object_pose_head=False in the motion-head experiment config (per spec §3).
Optional: pip install -e third_party/4RC on remote if we want to run Path A (offline pretrained inference) as an ablation.

caveats: Spec is NOT yet approved — user-review gate open, writing-plans not invoked.
P0-manifest expansion from AM sidecar remains pending; this design is architectural, does not replace data expansion.
4-view budget assumed sufficient; if motion extrapolation is limited in smoke/overfit, fall back to widening to 8 or 16 views (spec §8).
Positional encoding assumes 4RC CrossBlock accepts pos=(None, pos_k); fallback is learned 1D embedding over 512 canonical-point slots (spec §9 open Q #1).
LOC: spec says ~200 LOC after wiring for new file; source motiondecoder.py is 180 LOC — different things (source vs adapted target).
resume_prompt: Read the sidecar at https://haonanhe.github.io/HOI3R-project-tracking/updates/2026-04-21-session-summary-dcf-motion-head-brainstorm.json and continue from the first pending task.
